name: laravel-bagisto-devcontainer
postCreateCommand: cp .env.example .env && sed -i 's/^DB_HOST=.*/DB_HOST=db/' .env && sed -i 's/^DB_CONNECTION=.*/DB_CONNECTION=mysql/' .env && composer install --no-interaction --no-progress && pnpm install --prefer-offline && php artisan key:generate --no-interaction && php artisan migrate --seed --no-interaction && php artisan storage:link --no-interaction && pnpm run build && composer require laravel/boost --dev --no-interaction && php artisan optimize:clear --no-interaction
